testcase.name: verifyCheckoutWithEmptyCart

failure.message: Checkout page should not appear for empty cart expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Checkout page should not appear for empty cart expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:79) at tests.CartTest.verifyCheckoutWithEmptyCart(CartTest.java:59) at
